sutta: 0 2 1 the buddha said monks a monk who follows after 5 things is mistrusted and suspected he is thought of as an evil monk even if he has 1 to the immovable what 5 here in monks among frequents a prostitute's house he frequents a widow's house he frequents the house of some unmarried woman or where a eunuch stays at all he frequents the nuns quarters verily monks a man who follows after these 5 things is mistrusted and suspected he is thought of as an evil monk even if he has 1 to the immovable that's the end of the sutta
commentary: this suta is talking about the wrong results of a manga called the agochara 5 types of places a monk should not go often he can go once or twice if necessary but he keeps going there people will be will suspect him of being an evil manga and even if he has 1 to the immovable according to the commentary this means that even if he as he he is an arahant if he keeps going to these few types of places people will suspect him to have evil intentions first 1 is a prostitute's house that is quite obvious the second 1 is a widow's house the third 1 is some unmarried woman that means some 1 of middle age or soul an unmarried third 1 is a young or a homosexual if somebody is known to be a homosexual and a monk keeps going there people will naturally suspect something wrong or he keeps going to the nun's quarters that also something wrong so that's the end of this the next 1 is
